
func setupHandlers(s *Server) {
	// Pages
	s.mux.HandleFunc(
		"GET /",
		s.handlePageIndexGET)
	s.mux.HandleFunc(
		"GET /post/{slug}/{$}",
		s.handlePagePostGET)
	s.mux.HandleFunc(
		"GET /post/{slug}/_$/{$}",
		s.handlePagePostGETStream)
	s.mux.HandleFunc(
		"POST /sign-out/{$}",
		s.handlePOSTSignOut)
	s.mux.HandleFunc(
		"POST /post/{slug}/comment/{$}",
		s.handlePagePostPOSTComment)
}
